summary: The diff implements a Calculator page with a custom hook (useCalculator.ts), a Calculator UI component (Calculator.tsx), and navigation integration in App.tsx and Layout.tsx. All major REQ-10 acceptance criteria appear to be addressed: navigation entry, numeric display, full button grid (0–9, decimal, +, −, ×, ÷, =, C, +/−, %), division-by-zero error handling, medical theme styling, and responsive layout.
